periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 79, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 9pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 55, with temperatures rising to around 57 overnight. North northeast wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
